security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Game SDK dump browser, differ, and exporter.
bundle.longDescription: Codex Atlas ingests game SDK dumper output, stores each version as a semantic graph in SQLite, lets you browse and search 200k+ symbols, computes structural diffs between versions, and exports selected symbols as trainer scaffolds.
